subcodes.title: Words to Azizollah Bahadur spoken around April 1915
subcodes.first_line: On your return, write to the beloved friends everywhere and give them my heartiest love. Tell them that my health
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
